scope: wave2 fan-out migration: only the 2 legacy-parity streams NOT blocked by ENGINE_GAP (dashboards, downtimes) are implemented this wave. monitors/users/slo are legacy-parity streams that are BLOCKED (not merely deferred) by an engine pagination gap — see docs.md Known limits — and are excluded here pending a follow-up engine-dialect increment, not Pass B scope narrowing. The full Datadog surface (metrics, logs, APM traces, incidents, security signals, synthetics) is separately out of scope until Pass B.
